name: Gazpacho (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes and onions.
2. Finely chop the parsley, garlic, green pepper, celery, and cucumber.
3. Add all ingredients to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed (salt, white pepper, Worcestershire sauce).
5. Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
